# Agentic Design Patterns

Agentic systems combine reusable design patterns to plan, act, retrieve
knowledge, remember context, and collaborate with other agents.

Part I: The Patterns
Prompt Chaining Pattern Overview    3
Tool Use Pattern Overview    61
Knowledge Retrieval (RAG) Pattern Overview    193
Multi-Agent Collaboration Pattern Overview    98

1. Prompt Chaining
2. Routing
3. Parallelization
4. Planning
5. Tool Use
6. Knowledge Retrieval
7. Memory Management
8. Reflection
9. Self-Correction
10. Multi-Agent Collaboration

Prompt Chaining breaks a complex task into a sequence of smaller model calls.
Tool Use lets an agent call external APIs and databases. Knowledge Retrieval
grounds answers in cited source material. Memory Management keeps useful
context across turns. Multi-Agent Collaboration coordinates specialized agents.
